texto: You have no idea what someone else’s life is like. The girl who looks like she has it all could have an eating disorder. Or someone could be getting abused at home. Understanding why people do what they do is crucial
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kate Izquierdo: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “You have no idea what someone else’s life is like. The girl who looks like she has it all could h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, bully, girl pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de girl.
